moods.morning: Soft, focused energy for a calm start.
moods.noon: Catchy, upbeat momentum for the middle of the day.
moods.afternoon: Driven energy with sharper edges for late-day focus.
moods.evening: Warm groove and color for golden-hour listening.
moods.night: Cinematic late-evening flow with atmospheric textures.
moods.midnight: Dark, heavy energy for deep night sessions.

dj.title: Sona DJ
dj.text: Open Sona DJ here to blend your queue with wildcard, drift or timekeeper behavior.

session.title: Session Mode
session.text: Switch between Focus and Night mode. Click again to disable the active mode.

idle.title: Fullscreen Idle
idle.text: In fullscreen, UI fades after a few seconds of inactivity. Use settings here to tune the behavior.

sessionMode.label: Session Mode
sessionMode.description: Switch playback mood and visuals in one click.

sessionModes.modalDescription: Choose which genres are allowed for this session mode.

onboarding.label: Quick tour
onboarding.info: Show the onboarding coach marks again.
onboarding.resetDone: Onboarding reset. The quick tour will appear again.

customUrl.info: Use a custom URL for LRCLIB instead of the default one.
customUrl.label: URL
